build_system: Vite with TypeScript checking via tsc -b
test_framework: No test framework found (no test files, no test script in package.json)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors. 2. Run npx vite build to verify successful build.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in components.
key_patterns: Components are in src/components/ as .tsx files. CSS is in a single src/App.css file. i18n translations in src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts. State management via Zustand in src/store/gameStore.ts. WAR_TACTICS constant in src/types/game.ts defines 4 tactics in order. Coin image at src/img/coin.png. BattlePanel.tsx currently handles all battle UI including bidding sliders.
directory_structure: Root: index.html, package.json, vite.config.ts. src/: App.tsx, App.css, main.tsx. src/components/: all UI components. src/store/: Zustand game store. src/types/: game.ts with all types and constants. src/i18n/: translation files. src/img/: game images. src/utils/: game logic utilities.
